query:
UPDATE organizations
               SET name = $2, updated_at = datetime('now', 'subsec')
               WHERE id = $1
               RETURNING id          as "id!: Uuid",
                         name,
                         slug,
                         is_personal as "is_personal!: bool",
                         issue_prefix,
                         issue_counter,
                         created_at  as "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>",
                         updated_at  as "updated_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
